things.name: Haeundae Beach
things.description: Korea's most popular beach — 1.8-km arc of white sand backed by skyscrapers and beach clubs

things.name: Haedong Yonggungsa Temple
things.description: Spectacular coastal Buddhist temple built on rocky cliffs overlooking the East Sea — Korea's most photogenic

things.name: Jagalchi Fish Market
things.description: Korea's largest seafood market — pick your live fish, have it cooked upstairs for a fresh-as-it-gets meal

things.name: Gamcheon Culture Village
things.description: Busan's hillside rainbow village — colourful houses with murals, art installations and quirky cafes

things.name: Beomeosa Temple
things.description: 1,300-year-old Buddhist mountain temple at the foot of Geumjeongsan — peaceful forest hiking trails

things.name: BIFF Square & Nampodong
things.description: Busan International Film Festival's home street — handprints of Korean cinema legends and street food

things.name: Taejongdae Resort Park
things.description: Dramatic cliff walk on the south tip of Yeongdo Island with rocky coves, lighthouse and migratory birds

things.name: Gwangalli Beach & Diamond Bridge
things.description: Busan's nightlife beach — Gwangan Bridge lights up spectacularly at night, with bars and restaurants along the shore

things.name: Busan Museum of Art
things.description: Major contemporary art museum in Centum City — diverse collection of Korean and international modern art

things.name: Shinsegae Centum City (World's Largest Dept Store)
things.description: Guinness-certified world's largest department store — also has an ice rink, golf course and spa inside
